name: homarr
title: Homarr
description: Homarr modern dashboard for managing and monitoring your server with Docker integration

variables.name: HOST_PORT
variables.label: Web UI Port
variables.description: Port exposed on the host for the Homarr web interface

variables.name: SECRET_ENCRYPTION_KEY
variables.label: Encryption Key
variables.description: Secret key used to encrypt sensitive data (generate with: openssl rand -hex 32)
